data.title: Pharming Group to report first quarter 2026 financial results and provide business update on May 7
data.description: Pharming will announce its financial results for the first quarter of 2026 and offer a business update on May 7, 2026. They will also conduct a conference call at 13:30 CEST/07:30 EDT on the same day.

data.title: NORBIT ASA – Notice of Annual General Meeting on 20 May 2026
data.description: The Annual General Meeting of NORBIT ASA in Trondheim is scheduled for May 20, 2026, at 4:00 pm CET and will be held digitally without physical attendance. Shareholders can find details on how to participate on the company's website and in the provided notice. Shareholders unable to attend are urged to vote early or submit a proxy form before the meeting.

data.title: AS Tallink Grupp Unaudited Consolidated Interim Report for the Q1 2026
data.description: An Investor Webinar will present AS Tallink Grupp's Q1 2026 results today at 12:00 (EEST). Questions must be sent to investor@tallink.ee by 11:00 am, and further details can be found in a previous announcement. Join the webinar at the provided link.

data.title: PrecisionBiotics® (Novonesis) and Biocodex Mark Next Phase of Strategic Partnership with New Agreement
data.description: In Copenhagen, Denmark on April 23, 2026, PrecisionBiotics®, a division of Novonesis, and Biocodex solidified their partnership with the signing of a new agreement. This move is aimed at enhancing collaboration between the two companies following a strategic leadership meeting. This agreement marks the beginning of the next phase of their partnership.

data.title: Fisher & Paykel Unveils Nature--Ritual at EuroCucina 2026, Elevating Everyday Routines into Timeless Rituals
data.description: Unveiled at EuroCucina in Milan, Fisher & Paykel, the luxury appliance brand from Aotearoa New Zealand within the Haier Group global portfolio, presented Nature—Ritual, a 450m² immersive installation showcasing the State of the Art Collection.

data.title: Nel ASA: Receives a USD 7 million purchase order for PEM equipment to be deployed in the US
data.description: In Oslo, Norway, on April 23, 2026, Nel Hydrogen US, a branch of Nel ASA, announced the reception of a purchase order totaling approximately USD 7 million for PEM electrolyser equipment. This equipment is intended for the production of hydrogen at a public utility.

data.title: Essity: Interim Report Quarter 1, 2026
data.description: The first quarter of 2026 has been promising with positive developments – increased volumes and improved margins in STOCKHOLM. Net sales for this period saw a 5.1% decrease, totaling SEK 33,177 million compared to the previous figure of SEK 34,976 million. However, after excluding currency translation effects, there was a net increase of SEK 528 million in sales. Organically, sales grew by 0.4%, suggesting stable growth in the business.
